details: Building portfolio website using Next.js 16, React 19, and Tailwind CSS v4
Practicing clean Git workflow with Conventional Commits and PR-based development
Assisted in the development and maintenance of the IT stack for USHER Technologies Inc., contributing to various projects and tasks as needed.
Collaborated with the IT team to troubleshoot issues, optimize performance, and implement new features across the company's technology infrastructure.
Led the cloud and infrastructure initiatives for the AWS Cloud Club - Haribon, a student organization focused on cloud computing education and projects.
Organized workshops and training sessions on AWS services, cloud architecture, and best practices for club members.
Guided club projects in designing and deploying cloud-based applications, ensuring they followed industry standards for security and scalability.
